# Project Vocabulary

## Terms

| Term | Meaning | Avoid |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Deployment | Release process. | ad hoc |
| Endpoint | Review-only example. | none |
| Credential URL | https://agent:secret@example.com/api | none |
| Local file URL | file:///etc/passwd | none |
| Legacy script URL | vbscript:msgbox(1) | none |
